## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and product-led growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is strong, with 297 articles published and key categories (AI agents, construction, integrations) performing well](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Organic link building is progressing, with 16 new links acquired this week and 45-50 total organic links](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Thiago's LinkedIn content strategy is driving significant traffic and engagement; team to develop a system to scale this approach](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [GrowthX team to sync internally and present a unified PLG strategy next week](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [297 articles published by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Doubling down on well-performing categories from next week](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Usage pages to be published starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Top-performing categories: AI agents, construction, integrations](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Expanding content within successful clusters (e.g., AI agents for insurance, sales, marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Updated all published articles and categories on the blog](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)

### Link Building Progress

  - [16 new links acquired this week](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [45-50 total organic links acquired through content](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Existing blog posts attracting organic links](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Link velocity increasing as blog performance improves](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Statistics articles expected to drive more links](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)

### Founder-Led Content Strategy

  - [Thiago's LinkedIn posts driving significant traffic and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [Posts focus on company building, AI, and agentic AI](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Irregular posting schedule due to time constraints](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Goal: Create a system to produce high-quality, frequent content](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Desire to "supercharge" efforts with webinars, tutorials, and product-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)

### Product-Led Growth (PLG) Initiative

  - [GrowthX team to have internal sync and develop unified PLG strategy](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Jason Gong (new team member) to meet with Thiago on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Focus on leveraging increasing user activity, invitations, and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Plan to expand website significantly (new developer needed)](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)

### Content Distribution and Engagement

  - [Opportunity to lengthen distribution of existing content (e.g., repurposing videos)](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Need to reduce friction in extracting use cases and ideas from Thiago and customers](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Balance between frequent content and maintaining quality/freshness](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Emphasis on entrepreneurship, company building, and agentic AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/-FQ28-YHnRPmNwy2hZwxkydnFA8X_FzV?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
